text_blocks: Terms and conditions: (Mongolian) Secret History Travel Company/ Nuuts Tovchoo. Registered office: Akuma Centre, Worker’s Street, Bayangol District, 5 th Khoroo, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.

Your booking contract incorporates these terms and conditions and by making a booking with us you confirm your acceptance of these terms and conditions to the exclusion of any other terms and conditions which you may seek to apply to the contract.
A.2 OUR PRICE POLICY, PAYMENT TERMS AND SURCHARGES

A.2.3 Payment of deposits and final payments can be made by direct credit transfer into our bank account (details of which will be provided to you upon request) or by debit or credit card via PayPal. Please note that for payments made by PayPal a charge of 4% will be added by us to the amount payable.
B. CHANGES AND CANCELLATION BY US
B.1 IF WE CHANGE YOUR ARRANGEMENTS BEFORE DEPARTURE
B.1.2 In the case of a Significant Change before your departure we will provide you with three alternatives:
B.1.2.1 alternative arrangements of equivalent or of very closely similar type, if available, or
B.1.2.2 alternative arrangements of a lower standard together with a
refund of the difference in price; or
B.1.2.3 cancel your trip with a full refund of all monies paid.
In all 3 cases, compensation will be paid as detailed in clause D.1 below unless the change occurs as a result of circumstances beyond our control where clause H.1 will apply.
B.2 IF WE CANCEL YOUR ARRANGEMENTS
B.2.1.1 alternative arrangements of equivalent or of very closely similar standard and price, if available, or
B.2.1.2 alternative arrangements of a lower standard together with a refund of the difference in price; or
B.2.1.3 cancel your trip arrangements with a full refund of all monies paid.
Any alternative arrangements or cancellation must apply to all persons included in your booking.

In all 3 cases, compensation will be paid as detailed in clause D.1 below unless the change occurs as a result of circumstances beyond our control (in which case clause H.1 will apply) or we cancel as a result of your failure to pay your deposit or the balance or any other sum when due on your part.
C CHANGES AND CANCELLATION BY YOU
C.1 IF YOU CHANGE YOUR BOOKING
C.1.1 If you want to change your trip in any way you must inform us in writing as soon as possible. We will try to help you, although we cannot guarantee that we will always be able to do this.
C.1.2 Where we can make a change, we will charge for any additional

Table of Administration Charges for Changes made by You The costs shown are per change as it is applied to the whole group and do not include any further costs that we may incur in making the changes or any charges made by our suppliers for such changes
Request for change received more than 12 weeks prior to trip commencing

text_blocks: When you have made your decision and are ready to book please use this form to let us know your plans.
The following services can be booked online through this page:

Tours – Places on all of our package tours are available to book online. Simply follow the instructions and select your tour package and available date from the drop down menu below. The form will take you through the process of making a deposit to confirm your place.

Accommodation – Use this form to take the hassle out of booking and confirming your accommodation in Mongolia. This form can be used to check availability and book your accommodation in either of our 2 ger camps. For other camps you can either fill in the enquiry form or email us directly on [email protected] .
Travel services – Use the enquiry form to book additional travel services such as translation, driver or guiding services.
Please refer to our terms and conditions before making a booking. You can check these by clicking here or by navigating through our website.

audited_pages.title: Mongolian secret history camp
audited_pages.description: Location: “Mongolian Secret History" tourist camp is located in the territory of Jargalant soum, Tuv province; a 68.82 mile drive by paved road and a 2.17 ...
text_blocks: 10 days Highlight of Mongolia tour

On this tour you will be exploring the must visit destinations of Mongolia- Gobi desert, Central Mongolia and Khovsgol lake. The highlight of the tour includes Kharkhorin, Khongor sand dunes, Yol valley, nomadic family visit, reindeer herders and Khuvsgul lake.

In the afternoon visit a local nomadic family in a ger and see their traditional way of living. You are welcome to participate in cooking, herding and milking livestocks. If anything it is encouraged. Enjoy horse riding by the Orkhon river. Overnight in a ger camp. (Ger camp, B, L, D)
Day 4- Khongor sand dunes & nomadic family stay
Stay with camel camel herding family and enjoy camel riding by the sand dunes. (Nomadic family stay, B, L, D)

Fly early in the morning to Ulaanbaatar. After lunch have a half day city tour including Choijin temple and Sukhbaatar square. Enjoy a traditional music and dance concert in the evening. Stay overnight in a hotel. (Hotel, B, L, D)

You will be staying right by the lake. Enjoy the largest lake in Mongolia, Khuvsgul Lake. It is an impressively beautiful site. Visitors can expect to see a lot of shamanic activity, to take boat trips on charming old tugs and even to see some Tsaatan Reindeer herders at certain times of the year. (Ger camp, B, L, D)
Day 10 – Fly back to Ulaanbaatar In the morning your guide and driver will take you to the airport. Overnight in a hotel. (Hotel, B, L, D)

text_blocks: 5 days Ancient city & camel herder homestay
Moderate: No hard physical requirements.
Day 1: Elsen Tasarkhai- Camel herders homestay
Day 2: Ancient city of Kharkhorum and Erdenezuu
Today you rise early at 7 am and return to Ulaanbaatar, arriving at a point of your choice around 9am.
Not included in the price: International flights, train tickets, travel insurance, international phone calls, alcoholic drinks, laundry service, souvenir shopping,
